name: Gen Z
overview: Professor Ren Xinzheng resigns to start a mentoring class for traditional Chinese medicine, hoping to train true successors. His students—Sun Toutou, his son Ren Tianzhen, lawyer-turned-student Yang Xiaohong, pediatrician Peng Shiyan, and aspiring doctor Zhao Liquan—struggle to get along, but must work through their differences to preserve the legacy of Chinese medicine.

trailers.title: ENG SUB【后浪 | GEN Z】首发预告Trailer——吴刚、赵露思、罗一舟24节气首发预告上线！
